---
title: 'BRAUM: Analyzing and Protecting Autonomous Machine Software Stack'
author:
- Yiming Gan
- Paul Whatmough
- Jingwen Leng
- Bo Yu
- Shaoshan Liu
- Yuhao Zhu
categories:
- Show All
- Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
topics:
- robotics
url_source: https://horizon-lab.org/pubs/issre22.pdf
journ: ISSRE
year: 2022
contrib: Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
image: featured.png
pub_number: 60
---
